reviews.comment:
La ruta un desastre. Mucha precaución. El lugar 10 puntos

(Translated by Google)
The road is a disaster. Be very careful. The place is a 10/10.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzeU9EZ2x3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio muy completa, instalaciones renovadas, baños muy limpios. Una parada asegurada a descansar y reponer energías para continuar la ruta. Mini mercado, hay Arboleda cerca para buscar sombra en verano. Muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
A well-equipped gas station with renovated facilities and very clean restrooms. A sure stop to rest and recharge before continuing your route. There's a mini-market nearby, and there's a grove of trees nearby for shade in the summer. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzNExDLWpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar para hacer un alto en el camino, comprar unas tortas fritas y tomarse unos mates. El paisaje es  muy especial, lastima la ruta 25 que hace varios años que esta muy deteriorada, una pena.

(Translated by Google)
The perfect place to stop along the way, buy some fried cakes, and have some mate. The scenery is very special; it's a shame Route 25 has been in such bad shape for several years now.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzOVlyeEZBEAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Cargar combustible con semejante paisaje, no tiene precio! (Salvo el de la nafta, que en el sur de nuestro pais es mas economico)

(Translated by Google)
Refueling with such a view is priceless! (Except for the price of gasoline, which is cheaper in the south of our country)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzLV9TdGNREAE

reviews.comment:
Antes los baños tenían agua caliente, ahora cada vez peor. Y nunca les funciona el posnet para cargar nafta. Pero sí para comprar sandwiches.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms used to have hot water, now it's getting worse. And their card reader never works for gas. But it does work for buying sandwiches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzMjhEMWlnRRAB
